title: Unakkaga Varuven Lyrics Pichaikkaran Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Unakkaga Varuven Song Lyrics From Pichaikkaran 
Singer(s): Janaki Iyer

nee oru paarvai
paarthidu podhum
unaku edhayum
naan seiven.

yaar enna sonnaalum
ennai indru konnaalum
naan undhan paadhi
purindhu kondaen.

yaar kooda vandhaalum
ennodu nindraalum
unpeyari sonnaale
thirumbi nindren.

nee oru paarvai
paarthidu podhum
unaku edhayum
naan seiven.
tamilStanzas:
உனக்காக வருவேன் 
உயிர் கூட தருவேன் 

நீ ஒரு பார்வை 
பார்த்திடு  போதும்  
உனக்கு எதையும் 
நான் செய்வேன்.

நியாபகம் முழுவதும்
நீ வந்து இருக்க 
உனது நிழலென இருப்பேன் 

நீ யாரா இருந்தாலும் 
உன்னை ஏற்று கொள்கிறேன் 

என்னை பிரிந்தால் 
அந்த நொடியே 
நான் இறந்து போகிறேன் 

உனக்காக வருவேன் 
உயிர் கூட தருவேன் 

யார் என்ன சொன்னாலும் 
என்னை இன்று கொன்னாலும் 
நான் உந்தன் பாதி 
புரிந்து கொன்டேன் 

யார் கூட வந்தாலும் 
என்னோடு நின்றாலும் 
உன்பெயரை சொன்னாலே 
திரும்பி நின்றேன் 

இந்த காதல் உனக்காக 
என்றும் தீராது 

உயிர் போகும் என்றாலும் 
அது போகாது 

உனக்காக வருவேன் 
உயிர் கூட தருவேன் 

நீ ஒரு பார்வை 
பார்த்திடு போதும் 
உனக்கு எதையும் 
நான் செய்வேன் 

நியாபகம் முழுவதும்
நீ வந்து இருக்க 
உனது நிழலென இருப்பேன் 

நீ யாரா இருந்தாலும் 
உன்னை ஏற்று கொள்கிறேன் 

என்னை பிரிந்தால் 
அந்த நொடியே 
நான் இறந்து போகிறேன்

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep love and commitment, emphasizing the lengths one would go to for their beloved.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Pichaikkaran, the song highlights the protagonist's feelings towards his love interest, showcasing their emotional bond.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by Janaki Iyer, known for her melodious voice that adds depth to the track.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Unakkaga Varuven is composed by Vijay Antony, who is celebrated for his unique musical style.

When was the song released?

The song was released on January 7, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Unakkaga Varuven, the protagonist expresses his unwavering love and commitment to his beloved, making it a quintessential romantic ballad. The soothing melody, combined with Janaki Iyer's heartfelt rendition, evokes a sense of nostalgia and longing. This song plays a pivotal role in Pichaikkaran, encapsulating the emotional depth of the characters' relationship. It beautifully conveys the message of love transcending challenges, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unakkaga Varuven from Pichaikkaran is a heartwarming melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and devotion. With Janaki Iyer's soulful vocals and Vijay Antony's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced true affection. Dive into the emotional journey of this track that promises to tug at your heartstrings.
stanzaMeanings: I will give my life for you.
Just one glance from you is enough, I will do anything for you.
All my memories are filled with you, I will always be your shadow.
No matter who you are, I will always seek you.
If you leave me, in that moment, I will disappear.
I will give my life for you.
No matter who says what, even if I die today, I have understood your half.
Even if anyone comes, if they speak against you, I will stand firm.
This love for you will never fade away.
Even if life goes away, it will not leave me.
I will give my life for you.
Just one glance from you is enough, I will do anything for you.
All my memories are filled with you, I will always be your shadow.
No matter who you are, I will always seek you.
If you leave me, in that moment, I will disappear.
